decisions.rationale: Simpler, no app registration, same as MCP Jira approach

decisions.decision: OAuth router (auth.py) left in codebase unused
decisions.rationale: Built first then abandoned — can remove in cleanup

decisions.decision: User info stored in sessionStorage not localStorage
decisions.rationale: Cleared on tab close — better security default
sessionStorage lost on tab reopen; saved credentials in SQLite remain
Simpler setup — no DB server needed
Backend checks jira_projects table count, returns flag in connect response — clean separation

decisions.decision: NoProjectPage matches no-project.html Figma design exactly
decisions.rationale: Pixel-accurate from UI/ design files — no deviation

context_notes: This session added post-login routing: after Jira auth, backend checks jira_projects table (new, always empty for now) and returns has_projects=false. Frontend routes to /no-project (new page matching Figma no-project.html design) or /dashboard. Backend restarted successfully. Phase 1 is feature-complete — only human testing + UAT re-scope + phase close remaining.
